mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 1.0% signals monetary accommodation that reduces the discount rate applied to equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors rotate into equities seeking yield.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns when FEDFUNDS < 1.0% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month payroll employment growth above 150,000 persons signals robust labor market momentum that sustains consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days without requiring external policy shifts.
failure_condition: Payroll growth above 150,000 persons fails to predict positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) signals weakening aggregate demand that compresses forward earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as investors reprice growth risk.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 1.5% month-over-month AND HOUST declines > 5% month-over-month
failure_condition: Joint RSAFS and HOUST contractions fail to predict negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of interaction term < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index (INDPRO) declining below 105.0 signals supply-side weakness that constrains profit margins and forward earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as market reprices cyclical growth expectations.
failure_condition: INDPRO < 105.0 fails to predict negative 5-day returns in more than 52% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate (UNRATE) rising above 5.8% combined with declining payroll employment signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer confidence and spending, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings forecasts are revised downward.
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or recession onset
failure_condition: Joint UNRATE and PAYEMS weakness fails to predict negative 20-day returns in more than 58% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of interaction term < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation measured by CPIAUCSL rising above 235.0 combined with elevated federal funds rate above 3.5% signals monetary tightening that compresses equity valuations through higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with persistent inflation
failure_condition: Joint inflation and elevated rates fail to predict negative 60-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of interaction term < 0.06 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) above 1,100 thousand units signals strong residential demand that sustains construction employment and consumer wealth effects, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through multiplier effects on aggregate demand.
failure_condition: HOUST > 1100 fails to predict positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) combined with payroll employment (PAYEMS) both declining signals synchronized supply and labor weakness that compresses profit margins and employment growth simultaneously, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as recession risk reprices.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO month-over-month change < -0.5% AND PAYEMS month-over-month change < 25,000
regime_hint: synchronized supply and labor contraction or early recession
failure_condition: Joint INDPRO and PAYEMS weakness fails to predict negative 20-day returns in more than 62% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of interaction term < 0.07 over any 2-year rolling window.
